prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard, Kiri Starling (feminine healer in cream and mint robes) and Kiri Moonvale (masculine ranger in green half-cape); Kiri Starling carefully opens her leather satchel and hands a bundle of medicinal herbs to Kiri Moonvale, who holds his field pack open to receive them, soft lamplight, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Kiri Moonvale secures the herbs in his pack and nods, then hands a leather-bound quest map to Kiri Starling, who tucks it into her satchel, both characters sharing a focused and professional expression of mutual support, consistent lighting and camera, no text, no watermark.
